title: Customer
description: Represents a customer entity in Dynamics 365 Business Central. Customers are the parties to whom the company sells goods or services. Each customer record contains contact information, financial settings, and trading terms.

id.description: The unique identifier (GUID) of the customer record

number.description: The customer number, a unique business identifier assigned automatically or manually

displayName.description: The display name of the customer (individual or company name)

type.description: Specifies whether the customer is an individual person or a company

addressLine1.description: The first line of the customer's street address

addressLine2.description: The second line of the customer's street address

city.description: The city of the customer's address

state.description: The state or province code of the customer's address

country.description: The country/region code of the customer's address

postalCode.description: The postal or ZIP code of the customer's address

salespersonCode.description: The code of the salesperson assigned to this customer

balanceDue.description: The total balance due from the customer (read-only, computed)

creditLimit.description: The maximum credit amount allowed for the customer

taxLiable.description: Indicates whether the customer is liable for sales tax

taxAreaId.description: The unique identifier of the tax area assigned to the customer

taxAreaDisplayName.description: The display name of the tax area (read-only)

taxRegistrationNumber.description: The customer's tax registration number (VAT number or similar)

currencyId.description: The unique identifier of the currency used for this customer

currencyCode.description: The currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) used for transactions with this customer

paymentTermsId.description: The unique identifier of the payment terms assigned to the customer

shipmentMethodId.description: The unique identifier of the shipment method

paymentMethodId.description: The unique identifier of the payment method

blocked.description: Specifies which transactions are blocked for the customer: blank (none), Ship, Invoice, or All

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the customer record was last modified (read-only)
